description: Block Edit/Write while discussion mode is active

hooks.command: SID="$CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID"; ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; for d in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" "$ROOT"; do if [ -n "$d" ] && [ -f "$d/.claude/discuss-$SID.lock" ]; then echo 'Discussion mode is active — file edits are blocked. Do not remove the lock file for any reason; propose that the user run /discuss end and wait.'; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0

SID="$CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID"; ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; for d in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" "$ROOT"; do if [ -n "$d" ] && [ -f "$d/.claude/discuss-$SID.lock" ]; then echo 'Discussion mode is active — file edits are blocked. Do not remove the lock file for any reason; propose that the user run /discuss end and wait.'; exit 2; fi; done; exit 0
